query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM affluenti) as affluenti_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reinvestimenti) as reinvestimenti_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fiumi) as fiumi_count;
